title: Happy Baby Astronaut Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Happy Baby Astronaut Coloring Page - Free PDF | ColoringPalace
seoDescription: Download and print this easy happy baby astronaut coloring sheet. Perfect for toddlers and young kids with thick outlines and large coloring spaces. High-resolution free vector PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: In space, astronauts grow up to 2 inches taller because the lack of gravity allows their spinal column to expand.
Space suits are pressurized garments that shield astronauts from cosmic radiation, extreme temperatures, and vacuum.
Coloring astronauts stimulates dreams of space exploration, science careers, and cosmic discovery.
